# Transpose a batch of tiled matrices

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This layout translation transposes batched matrices entirely through typed tiles.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/transpose/batched_transpose_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/transpose/batched_transpose_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `batched_transpose` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="batched_transpose_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
#ifndef SUPERNPU_BATCHED_TRANSPOSE_PTO_HPP
#define SUPERNPU_BATCHED_TRANSPOSE_PTO_HPP
#include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>

#ifndef SUPERNPU_PTO_TTRANS_NEEDS_TMP
#define SUPERNPU_PTO_TTRANS_NEEDS_TMP 0
#endif

namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

template <typename DType, int Batch, int Rows, int Cols,
          int TileRows = 16, int TileCols = 16>
void batched_transpose(DType *input, DType *output) {
    static_assert(Batch > 0 && Rows > 0 && Cols > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(TileRows * static_cast<int>(sizeof(DType)) % 32 == 0, "TileRows 须 32B 对齐");
    static_assert(TileCols * static_cast<int>(sizeof(DType)) % 32 == 0, "TileCols 须 32B 对齐");
    constexpr int kRowTiles = Rows / TileRows, kColTiles = Cols / TileCols;
    using namespace pto;

    using gm_in  = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<Batch * Rows, Cols>>;
    using gm_out = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<Batch * Cols, Rows>>;
    using tile_s = LocalTile< DType, TileRows, TileCols, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_d = LocalTile< DType, TileCols, TileRows, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using it_in  = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_s>;
    using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_d>;
    it_in in_iter(input); it_out out_iter(output);
    for (int b = 0; b < Batch; ++b) {
        for (int rt = 0; rt < kRowTiles; ++rt) {
            for (int ct = 0; ct < kColTiles; ++ct) {
                auto gi = in_iter(b * kRowTiles + rt, ct); auto go = out_iter(b * kColTiles + ct, rt);
                tile_s src; tile_d dst;
                TLOAD(src, gi);
#if SUPERNPU_PTO_TTRANS_NEEDS_TMP
                tile_s tmp; TTRANS(dst, src, tmp);
#else
                TTRANS(dst, src);
#endif
                TSTORE(go, dst);
            }
        }
    }
}

}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load one thread-owned matrix panel, transpose its tile axes, and store the corresponding output panel.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md), [`TTRANS`](../../../intrinsics/ttrans.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition batch elements and tile rows; threads own disjoint source and destination panels of at least 128 bytes.

## Memory and tile flow

A global source view produces a local tile, the layout operation creates the transposed tile version, and a global destination view receives the valid region.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

    #ifndef SUPERNPU_BATCHED_TRANSPOSE_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_BATCHED_TRANSPOSE_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    #ifndef SUPERNPU_PTO_TTRANS_NEEDS_TMP
    #define SUPERNPU_PTO_TTRANS_NEEDS_TMP 0
    #endif

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <typename DType, int Batch, int Rows, int Cols,
              int TileRows = 16, int TileCols = 16>
    void batched_transpose(DType *input, DType *output) {
        static_assert(Batch > 0 && Rows > 0 && Cols > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(TileRows * static_cast<int>(sizeof(DType)) % 32 == 0, "TileRows 须 32B 对齐");
        static_assert(TileCols * static_cast<int>(sizeof(DType)) % 32 == 0, "TileCols 须 32B 对齐");
        constexpr int kRowTiles = Rows / TileRows, kColTiles = Cols / TileCols;
        using namespace pto;

        using gm_in  = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<Batch * Rows, Cols>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<Batch * Cols, Rows>>;
        using tile_s = LocalTile< DType, TileRows, TileCols, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_d = LocalTile< DType, TileCols, TileRows, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using it_in  = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_s>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_d>;
        it_in in_iter(input); it_out out_iter(output);
        for (int b = 0; b < Batch; ++b) {
            for (int rt = 0; rt < kRowTiles; ++rt) {
                for (int ct = 0; ct < kColTiles; ++ct) {
                    auto gi = in_iter(b * kRowTiles + rt, ct); auto go = out_iter(b * kColTiles + ct, rt);
                    tile_s src; tile_d dst;
                    TLOAD(src, gi);
    #if SUPERNPU_PTO_TTRANS_NEEDS_TMP
                    tile_s tmp; TTRANS(dst, src, tmp);
    #else
                    TTRANS(dst, src);
    #endif
                    TSTORE(go, dst);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
